title: lepipogon obovatum
intro: Lepipogon obovatum is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lepipogon obovatum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lepipogon obovatum can be made by infusing its leaves in water to create a tea or by using its roots to create a decoction, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
